name: Apple Ricotta Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 large Apples (Rome, Beauty), peeled, cored, and sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the Grape-Nuts cereal on the bottom of a greased 8-inch springform cake pan.
2. Arrange the apple slices over the cereal and sprinkle them with the lemon rind, lemon juice, and cinnamon.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the ricotta, sugar, egg white, whole egg, and yogurt until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture evenly over the apples.
5. Bake in a preheated 350 degrees F oven for 45 minutes.
6. Allow to cool before removing the side of the pan with a knife around its circumference.
